title: koeleria grandiflora subsp. canescens
intro: Koeleria grandiflora subsp. canescens, commonly known as mountain hair grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Koeleria grandiflora subsp. canescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
